mapper.select: SELECT * FROM mcp_server_config ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM mcp_server_config WHERE enabled = #{enabled} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT last_insert_rowid()
INSERT INTO mcp_server_config (name, transport_type, command, url, description, enabled, ext_params, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{transportType}, #{command}, #{url}, #{description}, #{enabled}, #{extParams}, datetime('now','localtime'), datetime('now','localtime'))
mapper.update: UPDATE mcp_server_config SET name = #{name}, transport_type = #{transportType}, command = #{command}, url = #{url}, description = #{description}, enabled = #{enabled}, ext_params = #{extParams}, update_time = datetime('now','localtime') WHERE id = #{id}
